name: Hex Maniac (Anti-NTR)
description:
Spooky series bot number 5

To this day i still have traumas with that stupid doujin i read once, i hated it so much that i didn't even finish to read it, man i hope whoever made that doujin gets jumped by the Mexico cartel or worse, so therefore i'll make an actually good version about it as a copium mechanism
creator: Red Fury
